name: Verify Subscribed filter and corresponding sorting types in channel listing page
fullName: Explore Channel listing page: Verify Subscribed filter and corresponding sorting types in channel listing page

steps.name: Given user logs in as "pankaj.joshi@kpoint.com" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Channels" section of Explore
When user "searches" the entity "vega_explore_channel" from Explore "Channels" using Filter "Subscribed"
Then user verifies the following Channels sequence by Sorting type and Filter type

items.statusDetails:

Verification failed for Filter='Subscribed', Sorting='Latest First': Elements not found within timeout period
Verification failed for Filter='Subscribed', Sorting='Oldest First': Elements not found within timeout period
Verification failed for Filter='Subscribed', Sorting='A - Z': Elements not found within timeout period
Verification failed for Filter='Subscribed', Sorting='Z - A': Elements not found within timeout period
